rules.title: Avoid keyword spam in listing title
rules.safe_guidance: Keep title focused on mini desk vacuum, desktop cleaner, keyboard dust and dry crumbs. Do not stuff unrelated car, robot, wet/dry, HEPA or branded terms.

rules.title: Do not use unverified suction or power claims
rules.safe_guidance: Use factual use cases such as dry crumbs, keyboard dust and eraser shavings unless supplier specs support a numeric suction value.

rules.title: Avoid wet/dry or heavy-debris claims unless source product supports them
rules.safe_guidance: For the MVP mini desk vacuum, describe dry desktop crumbs and light dust only.

rules.title: Do not imply safety, HEPA or official certification without documents
rules.safe_guidance: Only include certifications, filtration grades, safety marks or warranty statements when the seller has supplier documentation.

rules.title: Images must match the listed SKU and claims
bad_patterns: showing car vacuum when SKU is desk vacuum
rules.safe_guidance: Use product visuals that match the selected SKU; hero/lifestyle/feature images should show one compact desk vacuum and dry desk-cleaning contexts.

rules.title: Avoid protected character, logo, or brand usage
rules.safe_guidance: Use generic color/style descriptions. Do not reference protected brands or characters unless seller authorization is documented.
